card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Coordinate mobile safe-area, shared overlay geometry, and browser layout through one no-overlap contract and proof matrix.
card.objective: Make menu, Options, play, and Pause remain readable and operable across phone, browser, PWA, and restored-window surfaces without per-screenshot offsets.
acceptanceCriteria: Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
Mobile and browser layout work can be verified independently and together through a shared matrix.
No completion claim relies on deterministic browser proof alone for a physical-phone defect.
Physical-device findings remain open until operator screenshots confirm the deployed behavior.
discoveries: Exact preview dpl_HAcz3TXAnQUca929gqnzHQ87rH7Y was promoted as production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG.
The public production 390x844 at 3x surface matrix passed all layout, containment, overlap, scroll, height-parity, console, and page-error gates.
nextActions: Collect operator production iPhone screenshots across menu, Options, play, and Pause with Smart Steering feel notes.
Complete installed-PWA and native browser-chrome/maximize proof before completion.
evidence: Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
Production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
Public production capture C:\ATLAS\tmp\captures\mazer-ui-surfaces\2026-07-15T23-54-36-177Z\report.md passed with zero console warnings, page errors, or production error logs.

entry.headline: Exact PR 76 mobile UI and controls packet released to production
completed: Promoted exact reviewed preview dpl_HAcz3TXAnQUca929gqnzHQ87rH7Y under current-thread operator approval.
Confirmed deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready on the canonical public alias.
Ran the complete 390x844 at 3x UI-surface verifier against public production with every gate passing.
next: Review the production release on the operator's physical iPhone and return screenshots plus Smart Steering feel notes.

card.title: mazer: normalize browser UI layout across viewports
card.summary: Normalize responsive browser geometry and preserve only semantic settings so viewport changes cannot replay stale layout.
card.objective: Recompute all menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry from the active content rectangle while preserving explicit player preferences only.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout-derived geometry is never persisted as player preference state.
A recalculated layout cannot overlap, escape the viewport, or hide essential controls.
Normal reload preserves supported semantic settings with safe migration defaults.
Narrow, wide, phone, and restore endpoints have deterministic evidence.
discoveries: Public production serves exact head 8ca79d9a through Ready deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG.
The production verifier passed text containment, overlap, scroll reachability, fade clearance, button fill, height parity, and runtime health.
nextActions: Inspect the production release through physical iPhone browser chrome.
Retain native maximize/restore proof as a separate remaining endpoint.
blockers: Physical browser-chrome and native maximize/restore proof remain outstanding.
evidence: Production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.

entry.headline: Responsive UI correction verified on public production
completed: Promoted only the exact preview correlated to head 8ca79d9a.
Confirmed public production aliases resolve to the Ready deployment.
Completed a route-aware production capture and runtime health check.
next: Use operator production screenshots for the physical browser-chrome endpoint.

card.title: mazer: shared menu and play run status panel
card.summary: Use one responsive menu and play status component for time, Rank or AI Rank, Score out of 100, and Maze level from the correct context.
card.objective: Give menu and active play the same compact status language while keeping score authority traceable to the canonical scorer.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu and play consume the same status-panel formatting and layout contract.
Panel text remains centered, contained, and readable at phone and desktop widths.
Panel width, gap, and play Pause placement satisfy shared viewport diagnostics.
Displayed score is traceable to canonical run-quality data rather than a presentation-only calculation.
discoveries: The shared 62px status panel and equal-height Pause control are live from exact head 8ca79d9a.
Canonical scorer authority remains a distinct non-terminal dependency.
nextActions: Confirm menu and play status sizing in operator production screenshots.
Consume the finalized canonical 0-to-100 scorer field before completion.
blockers: Operator physical-phone proof and canonical scorer authority remain outstanding.
evidence: Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
Public production status/Pause geometry passed at 62px/62px with no overlap or runtime errors.

entry.headline: Larger shared status panel and equal-height Pause released
completed: Promoted the exact shared status and Pause geometry correction to production.
Verified public production status text remains centered and contained.
Kept the card in Review pending physical proof and scorer authority.
next: Review production status rails on the operator's physical iPhone.
blockers: Canonical scorer authority remains a linked dependency.
